arts.ttl: Barcelona join forces with Coldplay for limited edition kit in Real Madrid clash
arts.sum: Barcelona have unveiled a number of front-of-shirt partnerships involving musical artists over the years, and British band Coldplay are in line to become the next

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star’s place vs Alavés thrown into doubt after training ground blow
arts.sum: A member of the attacking ranks at La Liga giants Real Madrid has seen his planned starting berth in the club’s next outing thrown firmly up in the air. This…

arts.ttl: Vinicius Junior to be Crowned 2024 Ballon dOr Winner
arts.sum: The winner of the 2024 Ballon d'Or has reportedly been informed ahead of October's ceremony.

arts.ttl: Endrick’s great form could come at a cost: Real Madrid set to pay hefty bonuses
arts.sum: Real Madrid’s Brazilian wonderkid Endrick is finally starting to find a bit of form for Los Blancos, despite still not getting many minutes. The 18-year-old has managed to net twice…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Alaves 2024 live stream: Time, TV channels and how to watch La Liga online
arts.sum: Real Madrid host Alaves in what should be yet another manageable game for Los Blancos ahead of the crucial Madrid Derby against Atletico, which will be played at the Metropolitano next Sunday. Real Madrid have what it takes to be considered the heavy favorites here, so they should complete a solid performance en route to a convincing win ahead of the Derby.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Deportivo Alaves: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid are in midweek La Liga action as they welcome early-season surprise package Deportivo Alaves to the Bernabeu on Tuesday night. Alaves are aiming to snap Madrid's lengthy La Liga unbeaten run which was extended to 38 games at the weekend with a hard-fought 4-1 victory over Espanyol .

arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: Arsenal tell Real Madrid Saliba is not for sale at any price
arts.sum: Sources have confirmed to FootballTransfers that Real Madrid hold a genuine interest in Saliba as they plan to sign a new centre-back in 2025 after missing out on Leny Yoro to Man Utd in the summer. However, we have also been told in no uncertain terms that Saliba is not for sale at any price, with Arsenal determined to fight tooth and nail to keep hold of the 23-year-old.

arts.ttl: Who is Enzo Alves, Marcelo’s son? Real Madrid eye first-team future
arts.sum: Enzo Alves, the 15-year-old son of Real Madrid legend Marcelo Vieira, is causing huge excitement with his performances for Los Blancos’ youth teams . Although his father left Madrid in 2022, and has now returned to his native Brazil to play his club soccer, Alves has remained in the Spanish capital.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid predicted lineup vs Alaves
arts.sum: A 4-1 victory over Espanyol saw Real Madrid extend their unbeaten run in La Liga to a record-breaking 38 games on Saturday, but very little has been simple for Carlo Ancelotti's team at the start of the new season. RB: Lucas Vazquez - An injury sustained by goalscorer Dani Carvajal at the weekend means he likely won't feature on Tuesday and Vazquez, who was poor on his previous start against Stuttgart, should come into the team.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star 'has already been told that he will win the Ballon d'Or next month' after stunning year as plans to pay tribute to him are 'revealed'
arts.sum: Plans are apparently already in place to dedicate Madrid's Nike store on the Gran Via in his honour with a golden theme and his image on display.
